title: mariscus laniger
intro: Mariscus laniger, also known as the woolly club moss, is a type of non-vascular plant that belongs to the Lycopodiopsida class. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote overall health and well-being. Mariscus laniger can be prepared as a tea or infusions, and is often used in herbal remedies to soothe the throat and chest, and to promote a restful night's sleep.
